contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Streamline shipping_planner: "Ship from" quick-pick (Kirsten / Matheus / Other)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/183
  
  Details:
  Streamlined `dapp.truesight.me/shipping_planner.html`. In production today there is exactly one shipper per mode (Kirsten/SF for USPS local, Matheus/Brazil for air freight), but the UI was still asking operators to make Manager and Shipping Type as two independent decisions and routinely tripping up new ones.
  
  ## What changed
  
  - Added a "Ship from" segmented control at the top of the page with three buttons: **Kirsten — San Francisco** (USPS local), **Matheus — Brazil** (air freight), and **Other shipper…** (reveals the legacy autocomplete + shipping-type select).
  - Primary buttons resolve the manager via case-insensitive substring match against the loaded `managersList`, mirror the choice into the legacy `<select id="managerSelect">` + `<select id="shippingType">`, and fire the same `onManagerChange` / `onShippingTypeChange` handlers the autocomplete path already uses. The legacy rows are hidden by default.
  - No backend change — GAS `list_managers` / `get_inventory` / `calculate_shipping` are untouched. `offchain asset location` col B stays open-ended; "Other shipper…" preserves access to any manager.
  
  ## Robustness
  
  - Buttons are disabled until `loadManagers()` resolves, then enabled only if their substring matches a manager record (tooltip explains why if disabled).
  - If neither Kirsten nor Matheus is in the loaded list, the advanced section auto-reveals.
  - Picking via the autocomplete (legacy path) marks "Other shipper…" as active so the segmented control stays coherent.
  
  ## Coordination
  
  Used `git worktree add ../dapp-shipping-planner -b feature/shipping-planner-streamline origin/main` so this branch ran in isolation from another concurrent Claude session in the dapp stack — zero file collisions, independent push/PR/merge. Worktree torn down on merge.
  
  ## Pull request
  
  - TrueSightDAO/dapp — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/183
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
